div.style: color: rgb(51, 51, 51) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 260px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Attorney clicks a cited span
in the G3 letter preview
(char-offset spans from the renderer)
or 'View source' on a chronology
row / risk flag

div.style: color: rgb(51, 51, 51) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 260px; text-align: center; width: 260px;

span.p:
ProvenanceViewer (token mode)
GET /api/matters/{id}/provenance/FACT_3
bare id on the wire — NEVER token-shaped

div.style: color: rgb(51, 51, 51) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 260px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(51, 51, 51) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 260px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(51, 51, 51) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 260px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(51, 51, 51) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 260px; text-align: center; width: 260px;

span.p:
200: display_form, outcome, source,
anchors: document_id, page, page_count,
superseded, blob_url, bbox = null
(metadata lookup NOT audited)

div.style: color: rgb(51, 51, 51) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 260px; text-align: center;

span.p:
GET /api/documents/{id}/blob
app-served inline PDF —
phi_access AUDIT ROW written
BEFORE the bytes leave

div.style: color: rgb(51, 51, 51) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 260px; text-align: center;

span.p:
PdfPageView
single-page render, amber page ring,
banner: 'Cited: page N of M'

div.style: color: rgb(51, 51, 51) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 260px; text-align: center;

span.p:
superseded or page > page_count
-> display WARNING, never a
fetch blocker (fail-visible)
